## Checklist

- [ ] PGN file(s) placed in `pgn/<youtuber>/<playlist>/<video>.pgn`
- [ ] Required headers present: `Event`, `White`, `Black`, `Result`, `VideoURL`
- [ ] VideoURL points to a valid YouTube video
- [ ] Timestamp annotations (`[%ts M:SS]`) added to moves
- [ ] `npm run build:catalog` runs without errors
- [ ] Tested locally with `npm run dev`
